results.rendered_html:
adhiśri 1 U.
1 To sleep on, ascend, mount, resort to; vilocane bibhradadhiśritaśriṇī  Śi. 1. 24  possessed of beauty; adhiśrayaṃtīrgajatāḥ 12. 50. 
2 To place over.
3 (adhiśrī also) To put on fire, make hot.
